headingHtml.description: Headline with allowed inline spans: <span class='small-italic'>, <span class='accent'>. Frontend renders as innerHTML — sanitize before save.

photoUrl.description: Optional override URL — used by the bootstrap seed to point at pre-existing /public/images/* assets without uploading them via the Media Library. Editors should use the `photo` media field; frontend reads `photoUrl ?? photo.url`.

centered.description: Centered hero (no photo) used on contact + legal pages.

priority.description: Passed to next/image priority loading on the page hero.
